subcodes.first_line: O thou who art captivated by the countenance of the Peerless Beloved! Thy letter was received, and its secret, like the rays of dawn, shone forth from the East of the heart [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای گرفتار روی دلبر یکتا نامه ات رسید و رازش چون پرتو بامداد از خاور دل دمید
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
